name: high_security_pq128
description: Post-quantum high-security profile under reference v2: L=64, N=8192. h_AB=6, h_BA=3, h_P=9 bytes -> lambda_preimage = 144 bits classical (~72 bits Grover-bounded per round). M=16 Final slots; bandwidth M*h_P = 144 B/round. s=4 (v2 sparsity), CandMax disabled (= -8 same as cut_limit, matches v2 reference philosophy), MaxIter=500 explicit. Pending F11-v2 re-validation.
